_comment: Source of truth for the iogrid.org DNS record set at Dynadot. Read by scripts/dynadot-apply.sh which converts these into a set_dns query string. Editing this file + re-running the script is the only supported way to mutate iogrid.org DNS — never hand-edit via the Dynadot web UI (drift will be silently overwritten on the next apply).

main._comment: Apex (subdomain='') record. Single A record pointing at the mothership LB IP; will be flipped to a CNAME-style ALIAS when iogrid moves to its own Hetzner Cloud LB.
